name: claude-cowork
description: Dashboard local de tareas que orquesta workers Claude vía tmux + integraciones (ClickUp/Jira/GitLab)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:live: concurrently -n SERVER,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:live -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
